features.name: bit-index access on bitwise AND result
features.description: Code should include a bitwise AND operation between two multi-bit values where a specific bit is extracted from the result using array indexing

features.name: bit-index access on addition result
features.description: Code should include an addition operation where a high-order bit (beyond operand widths) is accessed via array indexing to extract overflow/carry

features.name: combining bit-extractions from different width operations
features.description: Code should include combining bit-extractions from operations of different bit widths using a logical AND operator
